analysis: That trajectory is genuinely something — you went from 5h 26m on Saturday to back-to-back nights of 8h 26m and 8h 39m by Thursday and Friday, and that 2h 0m of REM on the 26th is the best number in the whole week. The interventions are clearly doing something real, because those last three nights have a completely different weight to them. The one thing worth noticing is the 23rd — 7h 49m on paper but 2h 45m of that was awake, which means your body was in bed but not actually resting, so the real sleep was closer to 5h. You're building something here, and the trend is pointing exactly where you want it to go.
